name: AgentOrchestra
description: Agent orchestration platform for Claude and Gemini.

commands.label: Start AgentOrchestra
commands.summary: Verify CLIs and launch the GUI.

commands.label: Direct Launch (No Checks)
commands.summary: Skip CLI verification and launch the GUI directly.

commands.label: Restart
commands.summary: Stop everything and launch a fresh GUI.

commands.label: Update + Restart
commands.summary: Git pull, refresh deps, and restart.

commands.label: Stop All
commands.summary: Kill the GUI and any background services.

commands.label: Diagnostic (Doctor)
commands.summary: Run health checks and print report.
